noResultsMessage: Sorry, we don't have this item in stock yet. Please try a different search or browse our available categories.
heroTitle: Fresh Groceries Delivered to Your Door
heroSubtitle: Fast delivery or pick-up in Kigali. Shop from farm-fresh produce to premium local brands, all in one place.
footerAbout: Your one-stop shop for fresh groceries and household essentials in Kigali, Rwanda.
feature_pickup_desc: Ready in 30 mins at any branch
checkoutProcessingDesc: Initiating MoMo push... Please check your phone to enter your PIN.
noOrders: You have not placed any orders yet.
pickupOnlyNotice: Pick-up from your nearest Simba branch — free, fast, and fresh.
infoDesc: We need your name and phone to confirm your order.
branchDesc: Select the Simba branch closest to you, then pick a convenient time slot.
depositDesc: A small non-refundable deposit of 500 RWF is required via MTN Mobile Money to confirm your order and reserve staff time.
nonRefundable: Non-refundable • Credited to your order at pick-up
momoHint: You will receive a MoMo push notification. Enter your PIN to confirm.
depositNote: The {{deposit}} RWF deposit is collected now to confirm your order. The remaining balance is paid at pick-up.
errorFullNameShort: Full name must be at least 2 characters
pickupReminder: Please bring this order number when you arrive at the branch. Your order will be ready for pick-up.
momoPrompt: A push notification has been sent to your MoMo account. Please check your phone and enter your PIN to confirm the 500 RWF deposit.
dashboardSubtitle: Manage orders, assign staff, and track pick-ups.
noOrdersBranch: No orders found for this branch.
selectBranchToSeeStock: Select a single branch to view stock
inventorySelectPrompt: Please select a specific branch from the left sidebar to manage its inventory.
noProductsFound: No products found in the catalog.
aiChat_welcome: How can I help you today?
aiChat_tryMessage: Try: "Do you have fresh milk?" or "I need items for breakfast."
aiChat_error: I'm having trouble thinking right now
